item2.hasBeenConvicted: The Reporting Person has not been, during the last five years, convicted in a criminal proceeding (excluding traffic violations or similar misdemeanors).
item2.convictionDescription: The Reporting Person has not been, during the last five years, a party to a civil proceeding of a judicial or administrative body of competent jurisdiction and as a result of such proceeding was or is subject to a judgment, decree or final order enjoining future violations of, or prohibiting or mandating activities subject to, federal or state securities laws or finding of any violation with respect to such laws.

item3.fundsSource: The Reporting Person acquired the shares of common stock of ELASTIC NV on behalf of its institutional clients who are managed on a discretionary basis. The purchase cost is approximately USD 423'217'533. The source of the funds comes from our institutional clients' assets. The funds used for the acquisition did not involve any financing or borrowing.

item4.transactionPurpose: The Reporting Person acquired shares of ELASTIC NV as part of its investment strategy, which includes considering the clarity and robustness of the issuer's long-term strategy; the functioning and calibre of governance structures and effective leadership; the financial strength and performance of issuers and the fair valuation of underlying securities; and financially-material sustainability risks and opportunities. The Reporting Person is therefore actively engaging with the Issuer to discuss and promote initiatives that align with these business practices. The Reporting Person does not currently have any plans or proposals that would result in a change in control of the Issuer, nor does it intend to acquire additional shares for the purpose of gaining control.

item5.percentageOfClassSecurities: Pictet Asset Management SA manages 5'288'262.00 shares of ELASTIC NV , which represents 5.02% of the total number of shares.
item5.numberOfShares: Pictet Asset Management SA has the Sole power to vote on 5'274'370 shares out of the 5'288'262 shares under management.
item5.transactionDesc: In the past sixty days, the following transactions have been done: Date Type Quantity Price Exchange 23.01.2026 BUY 55'798 71.71 New York Stock Exchange 23.01.2026 BUY 36'287 71.70 New York Stock Exchange 23.01.2026 BUY 103'174 71.74 New York Stock Exchange 15.01.2026 BUY 205'067 74.19 New York Stock Exchange
item5.listOfShareholders: The securities reported herein come from the assets of our institutional clients who are managed by the Reporting Person on a discretionary basis.

item6.contractDescription: The Reporting Person's exposure to ELASTIC NV is solely through direct stock investments held by its managed institutional clients. There are no contracts, arrangements, understandings, or relationships with any third parties regarding the securities of ELASTIC NV.

signatureDetails.title: Karine Valtanen Global Head of Compliance
